manualVerificationSchema.description: 手動確認用欄位。請在 items 內加入要核對的項目，completed=true 代表完成、false 代表未完成。

paths.name: Login rejected then retry success
paths.semanticGoal: Verify server-side login rejection returns to LoginPage.Failed, user can edit and re-submit to succeed.
paths.displaySummary: Login rejected then retry success｜Verify server-side login rejection returns to LoginPage.Failed, user can edit and re-submit to succeed.

paths.name: Category toggle rejected then cancel and logout
paths.semanticGoal: Verify category status toggle handles API rejection, user can cancel back to list, then logout clears session and returns to /login.

items.label: 註冊功能（Email + 密碼 + 確認密碼）
